timeline.event: Customer reports begin: empty completed reports appear and metrics remain normal initially.
agent-runtime v2.3.1 deploys with async completion reporting optimization.
Critical alert fires for completed_without_artifact and write confirmation latency.
First tracked ticket records completed-before-write symptom.
Team identifies status-ordering bug rather than storage latency.
Customer escalation confirms 8 empty compliance reports.
agent-runtime v2.3.2 hotfix rolls back async completion changes.
Metrics return to baseline after hotfix.

confirmed_facts: The anomaly begins after the 09:15 UTC deployment of agent-runtime v2.3.1 and subsides after the 11:30 UTC hotfix.
Multiple sources describe the same symptom: tasks are marked complete before artifacts are written.
The post-hotfix metrics return to baseline and sample runs confirm normal behavior.
likely_root_cause: agent-runtime v2.3.1 changed completion sequencing so tasks were marked complete before write acknowledgment, allowing empty reports to be emitted without a successful artifact write.
supporting_evidence: deployment-log.md: 2025-06-12 09:15 UTC v2.3.1 changed async completion reporting and status transition logic
system-metrics.txt: completed_without_artifact rises after 09:15 and alerts at 09:28
team-notes.md: 09:50 identifies a status-ordering bug; 10:30 correlates it with v2.3.1
customer-email.txt: reports empty completed reports starting around 08:00 UTC
tickets.json: T-2001/T-2002/T-2003 describe the completed-before-write symptom
inferences: The storage backend was unlikely to be the primary cause because the team checked S3 and found it healthy.
The dashboard symptom is downstream of the runtime bug rather than an independent root cause.
The hotfix likely worked by restoring write-ack-first sequencing rather than changing storage behavior.
unknowns: The exact code path in agent-runtime v2.3.1 that reordered completion and write acknowledgment is not shown.
Whether any empty reports were externally consumed before the hotfix is not fully enumerated.
The precise customer-impact count beyond the reported eight empty reports is not stated.
recommended_actions: Keep the v2.3.2 sequencing rollback in production and verify no regressions in the task completion path.
Add an invariant or integration test that prevents completion before artifact write acknowledgment.
Review alerting and runbook guidance so completed_without_artifact pages earlier and more clearly.
information_gaps: Missing write-path logs showing the exact failure mode inside v2.3.1.
Missing customer-side downstream audit pipeline logs to quantify exposure.
Missing code diff for the async completion optimization.
